rationale.Existence & Specificity: There is a clear quantified target of 100% with a baseline year of 2020 and target year 2030.

rationale.Existence & Specificity: The company provides no specific air pollutant reduction commitments, only stating commitment not disclosed.

rationale.Credibility & Transparency: No data is disclosed regarding pollutant emissions, indicating no transparency.

rationale.Existence & Specificity: The company has a clear, time-bound commitment for both deforestation-free supply chain and regenerative agriculture targets with defined targets for 2025.
rationale.Ambition: The ambition is meaningful with specific percentages and timelines, including a 30% regenerative agriculture target and deforestation-free supply chain by 2025.
rationale.Coverage: Coverage includes key commodities with some geographic and value chain details, but lacks specific references to deforestation-linked commodities.
rationale.Credibility & Transparency: Some framework alignment is present but lacks comprehensive public disclosure and detailed methodological information.
rationale.Delivery/Status: There is limited progress reporting; the regenerative agriculture commitment has achieved 39%, but other commitments lack current status updates.

rationale.Existence & Specificity: Multiple quantified targets with specific timelines and categorical breakdowns, though not all targets are 100% addressed.

rationale.Credibility & Transparency: There is disclosure and validation of targets, yet not all data points have full transparency or external assurance.
rationale.Delivery/Status: Consistent progress on some targets but others significantly lagging, reflecting uneven delivery.

rationale.Ambition: The ambition reflects a meaningful goal of 100% deforestation-free supply chain by 2025, aligning with industry norms.
rationale.Coverage: The commitment covers primary deforestation-linked commodities on a global scale, though asset coverage is partial.
rationale.Credibility & Transparency: The methodology is based on a Global Deforestation and Conversion-Free Policy, but lacks validation status and specific framework alignment.

Description.description: Kraft-Heinz commits to a 100% deforestation-free supply chain by 2025, using 2019 as the baseline year.

rationale.Credibility & Transparency: There is no disclosure of standards used or validation, which significantly reduces credibility.
rationale.Delivery/Status: There is no reporting or progress data, resulting in a lack of evidence for this criterion.

Description.description: Anglo-American has committed to a 50% reduction in freshwater withdrawal by 2030 from a 2015 baseline of 48,666 megalitres.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers freshwater abstraction specifically in water scarce areas with partial asset coverage and no value chain inclusion.

rationale.Existence & Specificity: The company has a quantified absolute reduction target with a defined baseline year of 2016, target year of 2030, and an interim milestone.
rationale.Ambition: The absolute reduction targets (30% by 2030 for Scope 1+2 and 50% by 2040 for Scope 3) are aligned with sector pathways but lack interim milestones.
rationale.Coverage: Scope 1 and 2 are fully covered across operated assets with total geographic coverage; however, Scope 3 lacks value chain inclusion.
rationale.Credibility & Transparency: Reporting is aligned with the Sustainability-Linked Financing Framework and validated with a 1.5°C trajectory but lacks other supporting standards.
rationale.Delivery/Status: The current reduction progress is off track with only 14% vs baseline and no reporting on interim milestones.

Description.description: The commitment is to achieve net zero emissions by 2040, with a 100% absolute reduction target from a 2020 baseline.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers Scope 1 and 2 emissions with total geographic and asset coverage, excluding the value chain.
Description.validation: The commitment is third-party verified and aligned with a 1.5°C trajectory.

Description.description: Anglo-American has committed to a 30% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas emissions by 2030, with a baseline of 13.41 Mt CO2e in 2016.
Description.coverage: This commitment covers all geographic locations and assets under the company's Scope 1 and 2 emissions, but does not include the value chain.
Description.validation: The commitment is not externally validated.

Description.description: The company commits to a 50% reduction in Scope 3 GHG emissions by 2040, using 2020 levels of 165.1 Mt CO2e as a baseline.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers total geographic and asset scope but does not include the value chain.

Description.description: The commitment is to achieve a Net Positive Impact on habitat protection and regeneration by 2030, using 2018 as the baseline year.
Description.coverage: This commitment covers biodiversity within the company's managed operations but does not include the value chain.
Description.validation: The commitment is not externally validated.

Description.description: Anglo-American has committed to a 150% reduction in air quality emissions by 2024, using 2018 as the baseline.
Description.coverage: The commitment focuses on dust and particulate-matter pollution in the Santiago Metropolitan Region, Chile, and pertains to part of the Los Bronces Integrated Project.
Description.validation: The commitment is not externally validated.

rationale.Existence & Specificity: All commitments mention 'Commitment not disclosed in provided data', indicating no public commitment for the specified criteria.

rationale.Coverage: There is no information provided on the scope of initiatives, resulting in no defined coverage.
rationale.Credibility & Transparency: The lack of disclosed data on waste volumes or tailings indicates no credibility or transparency.
rationale.Delivery/Status: The company provides no reporting on waste or material efficiency performance.

rationale.Existence & Specificity: Quantified water reduction targets with baseline and target years are provided, substantially satisfying the criterion.
rationale.Ambition: Targets align with specific timelines and percentages, indicating moderate ambition but with some incompleteness due to lack of details.
rationale.Coverage: The coverage includes global asset coverage for some operations, but lacks high-level identification of water-stressed regions.
rationale.Credibility & Transparency: Limited methodological standards and framework alignment result in partial satisfaction of credibility and transparency.
rationale.Delivery/Status: The evidence shows progress reporting and target percentages, but there are gaps in trajectory and milestone details.

Description.description: BHP has set a target to reduce freshwater withdrawal intensity by 20% by 2030, based on a 2022 baseline.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers cementitious operations globally but does not include the value chain.
Description.validation: The commitment is not validated despite being aligned with SBTi standards.

Description.description: BHP commits to a 20% reduction in freshwater withdrawal intensity by 2030 from a 2022 baseline.
Description.coverage: This commitment applies globally to BHP's cementitious operations.
Description.validation: The commitment is not validated by any external entity.

Description.description: BHP aims to achieve a 10% improvement in water efficiency by 2030, based on a 2022 baseline.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers mining operations at Escondida and Pampa Norte with a focus on water efficiency.

rationale.Existence & Specificity: There is a quantified absolute reduction target for Scope 1+2 with a defined baseline year, target year, and interim milestone for 2030, which is substantially detailed.
rationale.Ambition: The Scope 1+2 target aligns to some degree with sector pathways, aiming for a meaningful reduction, but does not fully elaborate on all entities involved.
rationale.Coverage: Scope 1+2 targets are globally covered across operated assets but material Scope 3 categories are only partially considered.
rationale.Credibility & Transparency: There is no alignment with recognized standards or disclosed methodologies, reflecting minimal transparency.
rationale.Delivery/Status: The reporting indicates a measurable 36% reduction in operational emissions surpassing the interim target, but lacks detailed annual documentation.

Description.description: BHP commits to achieving net zero emissions by 2050 for its operated assets, targeting a 100% reduction in absolute Scope 1 and 2 emissions from a 2020 baseline of 13.6 units.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers BHP's operated assets globally, with a focus on Scope 1 and 2 emissions.
Description.validation: The commitment is not externally validated, certified, or assured by any methodology or standard.

Description.description: The commitment is to reduce Scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions by 30% by 2030, using 2020 as the baseline year with an absolute target.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers global operated assets but does not include the value chain.
Description.validation: The commitment is not externally validated, certified, or assured.

Description.description: BHP commits to achieving net zero Scope 3 greenhouse gas emissions by 2050, with a baseline year of 2020 at 352.0 MtCO2-e.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers the global value chain, including steelmaking.
Description.validation: The commitment is not externally validated.

Description.description: BHP has committed to reforest 50,000 hectares in the Doce River basin by 2031, with a baseline of 0.0 hectares in 2020.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers the Doce River basin focusing on reforestation and springs restoration, including protected areas but not the value chain.
Description.validation: The commitment is not externally validated, certified, or assured.

Description.description: The commitment aims to respect protected areas, specifically excluding operations in World Heritage sites, on an ongoing basis without a defined target year.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers protected areas globally, with a specific focus on World Heritage sites, and does not include the value chain.

Description.description: The commitment is to reduce NOx emissions intensity by 47% by 2030 from a 2005 baseline.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers global cement operations but does not include the value chain.

Description.description: The commitment is to reduce SOx emissions by 67% by 2030 compared to a 2005 baseline within global cement operations.
Description.coverage: This commitment covers SOx emissions on a global scale, specifically targeting cement operations without including the broader value chain.

rationale.Existence & Specificity: The company only provides regulatory compliance statements without specific commitments regarding waste rock, tailings reduction, or material efficiency.

rationale.Coverage: The scope is not defined in any of the commitments provided.
rationale.Credibility & Transparency: There is no disclosure of waste volumes or tailings data.

rationale.Existence & Specificity: The company has quantified absolute reduction targets with a defined baseline year and target year, including interim milestones.

Description.description: Glencore aims to achieve net zero emissions by 2050, with a quantified target of 100% reduction from a 2019 baseline covering industrial emissions.
Description.coverage: The commitment includes Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions combined, but the specific geographic and value chain coverage are unspecified.

Description.description: Glencore commits to reducing Scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions by 15% by 2026, 25% by 2030, and 50% by 2035, based on a 2019 baseline of 546.5 million tonnes CO2e.
Description.coverage: This commitment covers industrial emissions, with an unspecified geographic scope and value chain inclusion.

Description.description: Glencore aims to reduce Scope 3 GHG emissions by 15% by 2026, 25% by 2030, and 50% by 2035 from a 2019 baseline of 546.5 million tonnes CO2e.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions specifically related to industrial operations, with no specified geographic or complete value chain coverage.

Description.description: Rio-Tinto aims to achieve net zero emissions by 2050, with a 50% reduction by 2030 from a 2018 baseline of 35.7 Mt CO2e.

Description.description: Rio Tinto commits to reducing its Scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas emissions by 50% by 2030, using a 2018 baseline of 35.7 million tonnes of CO2e.

Description.description: Teck is committed to reducing its GHG emissions intensity by 33% by 2030, using 2020 as the baseline year.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers all operational emissions across all of Teck's operations and is focused on internal operations.

Description.description: Teck is committed to achieving a 100% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2050, using 2020 as the baseline year.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers all operations within the company's internal operations, including total asset coverage, but does not extend beyond Scope 1 and 2.

Description.description: The company commits to achieving net-zero Scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas emissions by 2050 with a 2020 baseline.
Description.coverage: The commitment covers all operations with total asset coverage and only includes internal operations.

Description.description: The commitment is to achieve net-zero Scope 3 GHG emissions by 2050, using 2020 as the baseline year.
Description.coverage: This commitment covers all operations, assets, and includes the downstream value chain.

Description.description: Teck is committed to a 3:1 conservation or rehabilitation target by 2030 for every hectare affected, using a baseline year of 2020.
Description.coverage: This commitment covers all of Teck's mining operations and is applicable to internal operations.

Description.description: The commitment involves respecting protected areas, specifically targeting World Heritage and IUCN areas, without a quantified target or timeline.
Description.coverage: It covers Teck's exploration and mining activities globally in World Heritage sites and IUCN protected areas, focusing on internal operations.

Themes.Practice: Commits to 100% deforestation-free supply chains by 2025, covering all primary commodities globally, with 93.5% already achieved and on track for completion.

Nestle's commitment is backed by SBTi-approved targets with clear interim and long-term goals across Scope 1, 2, and 3, demonstrating strong credibility and on-track progress towards a 90% reduction by 2050.
Commitment to 100% recyclable, reusable, and compostable packaging by 2025 with 87% progress achieved, showcasing high ambition, specificity, and on-track delivery globally.
Danone's commitment is best-in-class due to its quantified target of 100% by 2030, clear baseline, strong trajectory with 99.3% achieved, and comprehensive scope and coverage of production sites.

The commitment to offset 150% of dust and particulate-matter pollution by 2024 in a specific geographic area, supported by replacing wood-burners with electric heating, shows strong specificity and ambition despite lacking validation.
Reforesting 50,000 ha by 2031, with 40,500 ha already ongoing, demonstrating significant progress and specific targets.
Commitment to carbon neutrality by 2040 for Scope 1 and 2 emissions, third-party verified and aligned with a 1.5°C trajectory.
SBTi validated target for 20% reduction in freshwater withdrawal intensity by 2030 covering global operations, evidencing strong external validation and ambition.
